reasoning: The document shows strong performance with a composite fidelity score of 0.8989 and high programmatic recall (0.907), meeting the threshold for automated approval. Although there are identified minor defects regarding missing images/icons and unlinked URL text, these do not represent major content loss or structural failure. Per the routing instructions, a fidelity score above 0.85 with only minor concerns is a directive for AUTO_APPROVE.
